DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DEEM MATTERS ADMITTED IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 24, 2013 TO GIVE UNIFUND CCR, LLC THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. UNIFUND CCR, LLC MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 12, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE PRO-TEM: ARLENE BARTON; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Off Calendar Nov-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on TUE-SEP-24-2013:
Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. [415.922.5939] specially appearing for plaintiff UNIFUND CCR, LLC; No other appearances.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff UNIFUND CCR, LLC'S Motion for Order to Deem Matters Admitted is GRANTED. The Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Elizabeth L. Riles; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Deem Matters Admitted
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Continued To Sep-24-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

PLAINTIFF UNIFUND CCR, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY's Motion For Order To Deem Matters Admitted is continued to September 24, 2013 to give Unifund CCR, LLC the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Unifund CCR, LLC must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 12, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Pro-Tem: Arlene Barton; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
